description: Buy Me a Coffee is a creator-support platform that lets supporters make one-time and recurring payments and buy digital offerings from creators. It also provides creator-side webhooks and an API for accessing account-related data.
summary: Buy Me a Coffee exposes a token-authenticated REST API for creator data and a webhook delivery surface with a published OpenAPI payload schema; no public GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surfaces were found.

surfaces.name: Buy Me a Coffee REST API
